title: Synaedrys calathiformis
taxonomy: Synaedrys calathiformis is a species of plant in the family Ericaceae. It is native to Japan and is a type of rhododendron. Synaedrys calathiformis is an evergreen shrub that typically grows up to 1 meter in height. The plant is characterized by its small, white flowers and leathery leaves. Synaedrys calathiformis is also known by its synonym, Rhododendron calathiforme.
